title: [kimi-review] f8d2596: [SEVERITY: high] The commit contains no actual code changes
description:
Commit: f8d259667
Message: fix(routing): prevent integer overflow in GPSR distance_approx_m()

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] The commit contains no actual code changes — the diff shows only the commit header and message. Either the fix was never committed (empty commit) or the diff was omitted from what I was given. A commit claiming to fix an integer overflow with no diff means the bug is almost certainly still present.
